The '''''Mawrunner''''' was a frigate assigned to the [[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Second Fleet]]. It was active during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. The frigate, along with [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|fleet admiral]] [[Tarla Limpan]] and a portion of the Second fleet, were destroyed by a blast from the [[Centerpoint Station]].

[[Tiom Rordan]], a starfighter pilot and love interest to [[Syal Antilles]], perished during the battle.

{{Ship-stub}}
